hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_response.filePath // .tool_input.file_path' | { read -r f; case "$f" in *.ts|*.tsx|*.js|*.jsx|*.mjs|*.cjs) bun x oxfmt --write "$f";; esac; } 2>/dev/null || true

echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"SessionStart","additionalContext":"harness-engineering active. Read AGENTS.md first, then docs/agents/progress.md for current state. Follow the research→plan→execute→verify loop. 1 session = 1 task."}}'
